title: Finding the First Multiple of 3 Greater Than 10

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we demonstrate how to use a flag-controlled loop to find the first multiple of **3** greater than **10**. The loop continues running until such a number is found.

**When executed, the code will show:**:

```default
Checking: 11
Checking: 12
First multiple of 3 greater than 10 found: 12
```
